title: Lesson 219: (Grammar) - what kind of; what sort of; what; no matter what (...

intro_cards.title: What Kind Of: どんな
intro_cards.body:
どんな means 'what kind of' or 'what sort of' — used before a noun.

• どんな音楽が好きですか？(What kind of music do you like?)
• どんな人ですか？(What kind of person are they?)
• どんな料理が得意ですか？
(What kind of food are you good at cooking?)

どんな vs どの vs 何の:
• どんな = what KIND of (quality/type)
• どの = which (selecting from known options)
• 何の = what is this (purpose/identity)

Answer: Q: どんな本が好きですか？
A: 小説が好きです。(I like novels.)
